create_contract.title: Create Contract
create_contract.description: Build a legally-sound Thai rental contract step by step.
create_contract.tenant_blank_note: Tenant name and ID will be left blank for paper fill-in after printing.
create_contract.tm30_description: Thai law requires landlords to file a TM.30 form with Immigration within 24 hours of a foreign tenant moving in. This must be re-filed each time the tenant re-enters Thailand. The contract will include this obligation.
create_contract.pro_required_desc: Contract generation with AI requires a Pro plan. Upgrade to unlock this feature.
create_contract.generating_desc: Claude is drafting your contract based on Thai rental law. This may take a moment.
create_contract.edit_hint: You can edit the contract text below. Changes will be reflected in the downloaded PDF.
create_contract.pdf_error: Failed to generate PDF. Please try again.

create_contract.ocpb_termination_note: Per OCPB 2025: Tenants have the legal right to terminate with 30-day written notice after completing 50% of the lease term. This clause is automatically included in all generated contracts.
create_contract.validation_deposit_cap: Total deposit cannot exceed 3 months' rent (OCPB 2025 regulation).

templates.title: Contract Templates
home.hero_title: Rental management built for Thai landlords
home.hero_subtitle: Upload contracts, track payments, automate penalties, and file TM.30s — all in one place, in Thai and English.
home.features_title: Everything you need to manage rentals
home.features_subtitle: From contract upload to TM.30 filings — purpose-built for Thai rental law and workflows.
home.feature_ocr_desc: Scan or upload Thai rental contracts and extract key terms automatically.
home.feature_ai_desc: Detect risky clauses and get plain-language summaries in Thai and English.
home.feature_payments_desc: Track rent, utilities, deposits, and late fees across all your properties.
home.feature_penalties_desc: Set custom penalty rules that trigger automatically on overdue payments.
home.feature_maintenance_desc: Assign technicians, track repair costs, and monitor SLAs end-to-end.
home.feature_tm30_desc: Auto-generate and print TM.30 reports for foreign tenants — legally compliant.
home.pricing_subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.
home.pricing_no_flow: Rent never flows through RentOS. You collect rent directly from tenants.
home.built_body: RentOS is designed around Thai rental law, Thai contract formats, and the workflows Thai landlords actually use. Full bilingual support — every screen in Thai and English.
home.built_tm30: TM.30 filing support for foreign tenants
home.built_ocr: Thai contract OCR and clause detection
home.built_law: Aligned with Thai Civil and Commercial Code
home.built_made_in: Made in Thailand · สร้างในประเทศไทย
contracts.parse_failed_toast: Couldn't read this contract — please re-upload
landing.hero_sub: No more confusing leases. No more lost paperwork. RentOS reads the PDF for you and shows both landlord and tenant exactly what was signed — in Thai and English.
landing.feature_1_desc: Drop a signed rental contract. Within seconds, every important clause is listed clearly — rent amount, deposit, lease term, notice period.
landing.feature_2_desc: Log rent payments as they come in. See which months are settled and which are outstanding — across every property you own.
landing.feature_3_desc: Landlords and tenants can switch between Thai and English instantly — the interface, the contract summary, and payment history all follow.
landing.built_body: Most rental tools are built for Western markets and localised as an afterthought. RentOS was built from the ground up for the Thai rental market — the contracts, the language, and the way landlords and tenants actually work here.
landing.cta_band_badge: Upload your first contract in under 2 minutes
landing.cta_band_sub: Your contracts, your payments, your tenants — organised and clear. No credit card needed.
landing.scroll_headline:
Your properties,
all in one place
landing.scroll_subheadline: Upload contracts, track payments, and manage tenants — all from a single dashboard.
faq.title: Good questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you might want to know before you sign up.
faq.q1_question: How quickly does contract reading work?
faq.q1_answer: Most contracts are processed in under 60 seconds. You'll see the key clauses extracted and presented clearly on screen.
faq.q2_answer: PDF is the primary format — most signed Thai leases are scanned PDFs. Image-based PDFs also work.
faq.q3_question: Can my tenant use the app too?
faq.q3_answer: Yes. After you upload the contract, invite your tenant by email. They get their own account to view the lease in their preferred language.
faq.q4_question: Is this only for Thai landlords?
faq.q4_answer: RentOS works for anyone renting property in Thailand — Thai nationals and expats alike. The app runs in Thai and English.
faq.q5_question: Is the AI contract parsing accurate?
faq.q5_answer: The AI does its best to extract and translate your contract accurately, but it's not perfect. Always review the parsed results and refer to your original document for anything critical. RentOS is not a law firm and does not provide legal advice.
faq.q6_answer: No. Rent flows directly between tenant and landlord as it always has. RentOS only helps you log and track payments — it's a record-keeping tool, not a payment processor.
faq.q7_answer: Your data is stored securely with encryption. Only you and your paired tenant/landlord can see your property data. We comply with Thailand's PDPA data protection law.
faq.q8_answer: Thai and English. The entire app — interface, contract parsing, and translations — works in both languages. You can switch anytime.
disclaimer.footer_text: RentOS parses contract data using AI — always verify against your original document. This is not legal or financial advice. RentOS does not collect, hold, or transfer rent money; all payments remain between landlord and tenant. TM30 filing is the landlord's legal responsibility under Thailand Immigration Act Section 38; RentOS provides reminders only. Service provided as-is; liability is limited to the maximum extent permitted by Thai law. Your data is protected under Thailand's PDPA.
contract.ai_parsed_top_warning_title: AI-parsed content — verify before relying on it
contract.ai_parsed_top_warning_body: RentOS uses AI to extract key terms from your contract. The parsed data may contain errors or omissions. Always review the original document before making decisions based on the parsed clauses.
settings.about_disclaimer: RentOS parses contract data using AI — always verify against your original document. This is not legal or financial advice. RentOS does not collect, hold, or transfer rent money; all payments remain between landlord and tenant. TM30 filing is the landlord's legal responsibility under Thailand Immigration Act Section 38; RentOS provides reminders only. Service provided as-is; liability is limited to the maximum extent permitted by Thai law. Your data is protected under Thailand's PDPA.
